news.content: <a href="https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S016786552400059X" target="_blank">Channel-spatial knowledge distillation for efficient semantic segmentation<a>" has been accepted to The ELSEVIER Pattern Recognition Letters
New paper accepted at Affinity Workshop NAML (North Africans in Machine Learning Workshop) of NeurIPS 2023
The deadline of our Special Issue "Artificial Intelligence Compression and Acceleration for Smart Sensing Applications" is expired
<a href="docs/TheseVisionSousMarine_LabISEN-Thales.pdf" target="_blank">Phd position on Frugal and compressed learning for the interpretation of underwater scenes (position filled)
2 conference papers about No-reference 3D Point Cloud Quality Assessment have been accepted to The CBMI 2023 and GRETSI 2023
Our paper "No-reference 3D Point Cloud Quality Assessment using Multi-View Projection and Deep Convolutional Neural Network" has been accepted to The IEEE Access
Our paper "Semantic Images Segmentation for autonomous driving using Self-Attention Knowledge Distillation" has been accepted to The IEEE SITIS 2022
Our paper "No-reference Point Clouds Quality Assessment using Transformer and Visual Saliency" has been accepted to The QoEVMA/ACMM 2022
Our paper "Blind projection-based 3D point cloud quality assessment method using a convolutional neural network" has been accepted to The VISAPP 2022
Our paper "A Multi-task convolutional neural network for blind stereoscopic image quality assessment using naturalness analysis" has been accepted to The ICIP 2021
Salima Bourbia starts a PhD thesis, working on quality assessment of 3D point cloud
New journal paper accepted in Computers & Electrical Engineering on Multivariate Copula Statistical Model and Weighted Sparse Classification for Radar Image Target Recognition
New position : Associate Professor at <a href="https: //isen-nantes.fr/">ISEN Yncréa Ouest/Nantes Campus, France
I successfully defended my PhD thesis !
